projectDescription: An ultra-high-performance, secure acceleration engine that proxies developer resources—code repos, package registries, container images, AI APIs—through a global edge network.
keyFeatures: Global edge acceleration via Cloudflare Workers with smart placement
Unified URL prefix routing for 40+ platforms (code repos, package managers, container registries, AI APIs)
Full Git protocol support including clone, push, pull, LFS, and submodules
Docker/OCI container registry protocol with auth token handling
AI inference API acceleration for 30+ providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, etc.)
Enterprise-grade security headers (HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options, Permissions-Policy)
Edge caching with 30-minute TTL and cache-bypass for Git/protocol traffic
Intelligent retry with linear backoff (up to 3 retries)
Performance monitoring via X-Performance-Metrics response headers
Multi-platform deployment: Cloudflare Workers/Pages, Vercel, Netlify, Deno Deploy, Docker
publicApiSurface: GET /cr/[registry]/... — Container registry acceleration (Docker Hub, GHCR, GCR, ECR, etc.)
GET /ip/[provider]/... — AI inference provider acceleration (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, etc.)
handleRequest(request, env, ctx) — main Cloudflare Worker entry point
PLATFORM_CATALOG — platform prefix to base URL mapping
CONFIG — timeout, retry, cache, and security configuration
